title: Mainchit
description:
This modpack for SMP Mainchit
This page is for downloading different server seasons
body: This modpack is originally for players of the Minechit server, but you can use it to play with the Create mod. The modpack is quite optimized and has mods to improve the end and the nether dimension. Sorry this text was made with the help of Google Translate. If you have any questions, write to my email(time4ig.2009@gmail.com) or to me in telegram(@totem4ig)
